feedback: TDD authored for REQ-000055. Wires the existing autonomous-dev-homelab design corpus to the live homelab: fixes TS2493 in tests/cli/test-safety-cli.test.ts (typed jest.MockedFunction<CancelAuditFn>, no strict weakening); adds tsconfig.build.json + build/package/deploy scripts; introduces src/config (Zod-validated homelab.config.yaml), src/secrets (Vault AppRole resolver + redactor, hash-only audit refs), src/live (MCP-first/SSH-fallback transport selector, runtime bootstrap); adds `homelab connect --test`, `homelab autofix propose|dry-run|abort-pending` (via existing cancelDelayedAction) with MutationBarrier enforcing L0 dry-run only; wires live probes for Swarm + Unraid into existing ObservationCollector; deploy scripts use symlink-flip for reversible install/upgrade/rollback. Preserves all existing tests + safety model (destructiveness ladder, typed-CONFIRM, 24h delay). Includes 6 ADRs, error taxonomy with exit codes, 15-task implementation plan (~40 ideal-hours), full PRD-FR traceability, and evidence bundle spec.

artifacts.title: TDD: REQ-000055 — Make autonomous-dev-homelab Operate the Live Homelab End-to-End
